# Using comments to trigger inline code

<!-- source: 05-github-copilot.qmd, section "2. Using comments" -->

How to steer completions with plain-English comments instead of typing code yourself, including a comments-only data wrangling exercise.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge using comments-only wrangling on the benthic/fish data.
:::
